title: Claude Code just Changed Website Design Forever
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates how Claude Code enables developers to build responsive client websites and provide clients with a CMS interface for editing content without touching code. The workflow integrates design extraction, code generation, and database management through MongoDB to deploy scalable client-editable sites.
